hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then python -m py_compile "$file" && echo "✓ syntax ok: $file" || echo "✗ syntax error: $file"; fi
cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/hoangnguyen/kyvra/kyvra-agentic && pytest --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished" with title "kyvra-agentic" sound name "Glass"'
